title: Cocoon.
content:
Drab habitation of whom?
    Tabernacle or tomb,
    Or dome of worm,
    Or porch of gnome,
    Or some elf's catacomb?
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Cocoon."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
